TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cinemnemay Itiniay i Taipei. Cinemnemay Itiniay i Yuli Cen no Hualien ko Cinemnemay a niyaro', 845 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,421 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 21% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 506 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 79% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,915 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 13%, Bunun 6%, Truku 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. U miciekay kalimelaan i niyaro' Tuna kitiraan i kemud nu Sin-tin-ci Si-co alalan, saka tudung hananay tura Si-co a pangngan. U finacadan nu niyaro' 'Amis / Pangcah Sakasuwal a caciyaw Saun'Amisay atu sanuPalangay ku caciyaw U pituulan U Kiliseto atu Tinsikiw U laluwadan nu niyaro' Tu ikul nu 1960 a mihecean, 'aluman ku malinahay a Yen-cu-min taira i tukay mikilim tu saka'lihaday nu 'olip, i Taypak a tukay adihay ku katayalan, saka sa'aluman ku mafulaway nu 'Amis a taini, nikaurira nu 'Amis tu pinangan a saka'olip cuwa ka hecad tu nu Paylang, mangalef ho ku picaliwan tu luma' a payci, tangasa tu i 1970 a mihecaan ira ku nai Tukar a niyaro' tu Posko nu Kaliko a finawlan, pakatama' cangra tu cecay matuniyaro'ay a pala i sawail nu Sin-tin-si, nika masaniyaro' satu ku alo' nangra i tira, ikul tu nu 1980 a mihecaan tungatungal satu ku tamdaw a mafulaw taira tuna niyaro'. U nanumalitengan ho ku likakawa a likes nu niyaro', i 2004 a mihecaan patileng tu (Usay. Sawmah) i-su-tuan, pacafay a paluwad tu selanawan nu 'Amis a demak i niyaro', i 2010 patileng tu "a paluwad" "patunek, itini i 2014 a mihecaan misatapan a matayal. I niyaro'an ira ku cecay kasaupuan, u sapikaykian a pakaini tu nu finawlay a demak, lumasatu piilisin atu samaamaanay a selangawan a tayal tu pidademakan. O kasadakan no lihaf
S.PHON: ʦinəmnəmaj itiniaj i taipəi. ʦinəmnəmaj itiniaj i jo~u~uɾi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ʦinəmnəmaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. o~u~u miʦiəkaj kaɾiməɾaan i nijaro~uʡ to~u~una kitiraan i kəmo~u~uɬ~ɮ no~u~u sin-tin-ʦi si-ʦo~u aɾaɾan, saka to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ ħananaj to~u~ura si-ʦo~u a paŋŋan. o~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u~u nijaro~uʡ ʡamis / paŋʦaħ sakaso~u~uwaɾ a ʦaʦijaw sao~u~unʡamisaj ato~u~u sano~u~upaɾaŋaj ko~u~u ʦaʦijaw o~u~u pito~u~uo~u~uɾan o~u~u kiɾisəto~u ato~u~u tinsikiw o~u~u ɾaɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮan no~u~u nijaro~uʡ to~u~u iko~u~uɾ no~u~u **** a miħəʦəan, ʡaɾo~u~uman ko~u~u maɾinaħaj a jən-ʦo~u~u-min taira i to~u~ukaj mikiɾim to~u~u sakaʡɾiħaɬ~ɮaj no~u~u ʡo~uɾip, i tajpak a to~u~ukaj aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u katajaɾan, saka saʡaɾo~u~uman ko~u~u mafo~u~uɾawaj no~u~u ʡamis a taini, nikao~u~urira no~u~u ʡamis to~u~u pinaŋan a sakaʡo~uɾip ʦo~u~uwa ka ħəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u~u no~u~u pajɾaŋ, maŋaɾəf ħo~u ko~u~u piʦaɾiwan to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ a pajʦi, taŋasa to~u~u i **** a miħəʦaan ira ko~u~u nai to~u~ukar a nijaro~uʡ to~u~u po~usko~u no~u~u kaɾiko~u a finawɾan, pakatamaʡ ʦaŋra to~u~u ʦəʦaj mato~u~unijaro~uʡaj a paɾa i sawaiɾ no~u~u sin-tin-si, nika masanijaro~uʡ sato~u~u ko~u~u aɾo~uʡ naŋra i tira, iko~u~uɾ to~u~u no~u~u **** a miħəʦaan to~u~uŋato~u~uŋaɾ sato~u~u ko~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw a mafo~u~uɾaw taira to~u~una nijaro~uʡ. o~u~u nano~u~umaɾitəŋan ħo~u ko~u~u ɾikakawa a ɾikəs no~u~u nijaro~uʡ, i **** a miħəʦaan patiɾəŋ to~u~u (o~u~usaj. sawmaħ) i-so~u~u-to~u~uan, paʦafaj a paɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u~u səɾanawan no~u~u ʡamis a ɬ~ɮəmak i nijaro~uʡ, i **** patiɾəŋ to~u~u "a paɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ" "pato~u~unək, itini i **** a miħəʦaan misatapan a matajaɾ. i nijaro~uʡan ira ko~u~u ʦəʦaj kasao~u~upo~u~uan, o~u~u sapikajkian a pakaini to~u~u no~u~u finawɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ɾo~u~umasato~u~u piiɾisin ato~u~u samaamaanaj a səɾaŋawan a tajaɾ to~u~u piɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan. o~u kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u ɾiħaf
S.FORM: Cinemnemay Itiniay i Taipei. Cinemnemay Itiniay i Yuli Cen no Hualien ko Cinemnemay a niyaro', 845 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,421 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 21% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 506 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 79% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,915 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 13%, Bunun 6%, Truku 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. U miciekay kalimelaan i niyaro' Tuna kitiraan i kemud nu Sin-tin-ci Si-co alalan, saka tudung hananay tura Si-co a pangngan. U finacadan nu niyaro' 'Amis / Pangcah Sakasuwal a caciyaw Saun'Amisay atu sanuPalangay ku caciyaw U pituulan U Kiliseto atu Tinsikiw U laluwadan nu niyaro' Tu ikul nu 1960 a mihecean, 'aluman ku malinahay a Yen-cu-min taira i tukay mikilim tu saka'lihaday nu 'olip, i Taypak a tukay adihay ku katayalan, saka sa'aluman ku mafulaway nu 'Amis a taini, nikaurira nu 'Amis tu pinangan a saka'olip cuwa ka hecad tu nu Paylang, mangalef ho ku picaliwan tu luma' a payci, tangasa tu i 1970 a mihecaan ira ku nai Tukar a niyaro' tu Posko nu Kaliko a finawlan, pakatama' cangra tu cecay matuniyaro'ay a pala i sawail nu Sin-tin-si, nika masaniyaro' satu ku alo' nangra i tira, ikul tu nu 1980 a mihecaan tungatungal satu ku tamdaw a mafulaw taira tuna niyaro'. U nanumalitengan ho ku likakawa a likes nu niyaro', i 2004 a mihecaan patileng tu (Usay. Sawmah) i-su-tuan, pacafay a paluwad tu selanawan nu 'Amis a demak i niyaro', i 2010 patileng tu "a paluwad" "patunek, itini i 2014 a mihecaan misatapan a matayal. I niyaro'an ira ku cecay kasaupuan, u sapikaykian a pakaini tu nu finawlay a demak, lumasatu piilisin atu samaamaanay a selangawan a tayal tu pidademakan. O kasadakan no lihaf

**% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. o~u~u miʦiəkaj kaɾiməɾaan i nijaro~uʡ to~u~una kitiraan i kəmo~u~uɬ~ɮ no~u~u sin-tin-ʦi si-ʦo~u aɾaɾan, saka to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ ħananaj to~u~ura si-ʦo~u a paŋŋan. o~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u~u nijaro~uʡ ʡamis / paŋʦaħ sakaso~u~uwaɾ a ʦaʦijaw sao~u~unʡamisaj ato~u~u sano~u~upaɾaŋaj ko~u~u ʦaʦijaw o~u~u pito~u~uo~u~uɾan o~u~u kiɾisəto~u ato~u~u tinsikiw o~u~u ɾaɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮan no~u~u nijaro~uʡ to~u~u iko~u~uɾ no~u~u **** a miħəʦəan, ʡaɾo~u~uman ko~u~u maɾinaħaj a jən-ʦo~u~u-min taira i to~u~ukaj mikiɾim to~u~u sakaʡɾiħaɬ~ɮaj no~u~u ʡo~uɾip, i tajpak a to~u~ukaj aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u katajaɾan, saka saʡaɾo~u~uman ko~u~u mafo~u~uɾawaj no~u~u ʡamis a taini, nikao~u~urira no~u~u ʡamis to~u~u pinaŋan a sakaʡo~uɾip ʦo~u~uwa ka ħəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u~u no~u~u pajɾaŋ, maŋaɾəf ħo~u ko~u~u piʦaɾiwan to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ a pajʦi, taŋasa to~u~u i **** a miħəʦaan ira ko~u~u nai to~u~ukar a nijaro~uʡ to~u~u po~usko~u no~u~u kaɾiko~u a finawɾan, pakatamaʡ ʦaŋra to~u~u ʦəʦaj mato~u~unijaro~uʡaj a paɾa i sawaiɾ no~u~u sin-tin-si, nika masanijaro~uʡ sato~u~u ko~u~u aɾo~uʡ naŋra i tira, iko~u~uɾ to~u~u no~u~u **** a miħəʦaan to~u~uŋato~u~uŋaɾ sato~u~u ko~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw a mafo~u~uɾaw taira to~u~una nijaro~uʡ. o~u~u nano~u~umaɾitəŋan ħo~u ko~u~u ɾikakawa a ɾikəs no~u~u nijaro~uʡ, i **** a miħəʦaan patiɾəŋ to~u~u (o~u~usaj. sawmaħ) i-so~u~u-to~u~uan, paʦafaj a paɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u~u səɾanawan no~u~u ʡamis a ɬ~ɮəmak i nijaro~uʡ, i **** patiɾəŋ to~u~u "a paɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ" "pato~u~unək, itini i **** a miħəʦaan misatapan a matajaɾ. i nijaro~uʡan ira ko~u~u ʦəʦaj kasao~u~upo~u~uan, o~u~u sapikajkian a pakaini to~u~u no~u~u finawɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ɾo~u~umasato~u~u piiɾisin ato~u~u samaamaanaj a səɾaŋawan a tajaɾ to~u~u piɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan. o~u kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u ɾiħaf
